info.name: DabApp – Trainer Module V2
info.description:
## DabApp Trainer Module API

### Setup
1. Set `base_url` to your server (e.g. `https://api.dabapp.com`)
2. Run **Login (User)** → `{{token}}` is saved automatically
3. Run **Login (Admin)** → `{{admin_token}}` is saved automatically
4. All other variables (`trainer_id`, `garage_id`, `level_id`, `course_id`, `location_id`) are saved automatically after each relevant request

### Auth
All protected endpoints require: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

### Flow
`Login` → `GET Garage` → `PATCH Training Info` → `GET Levels` → `Register Trainer` → `Admin Approves` → `Add Location` → `Create Course` → `Publish`

item.name: 0 – Auth
item.description: Login endpoints. Token is saved automatically to collection variables after each login.

request.description: Login as a regular user. Saves `{{token}}` automatically.
Login as admin. Saves `{{admin_token}}` automatically.

item.name: 1 – My Garage – Training Info
item.description: Check which garage bikes are missing training info (plate, insurance). Update them before registering as trainer.

request.description: Returns user's garage bikes. Saves first bike as `{{garage_id}}`.
Returns all garage bikes with `is_training_ready` flag and `missing_fields` array (plate_number, insurance_expiry, insurance_covers_training).

item.name: PATCH add training info to a bike

request.description: Update training-specific info for a garage bike. All fields optional (send only what changed).

item.name: 2 – Levels & Specialties (Public)
item.description: Public endpoints — no auth required. Used by mobile to populate dropdowns at registration.

request.description: Returns active training levels (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced). Saves first level as `{{level_id}}`.
Returns active specialties: Coaching (1), Competition (2), Off-Road (3), Street (4), Custom (5). Use IDs in `specialty_ids[]` at registration.

item.name: GET all specialties with trainer count

request.description: Same as above but includes `trainers_count` per specialty (approved trainers only).

item.name: 3 – Become a Trainer (Registration)
item.description: 3-step flow: upload photo → upload certificates → submit registration. Admin reviews and approves afterward.

request.description: Upload profile photo. Returns file path to use in registration body as `photo`.
Upload one certificate file. Call multiple times for multiple files. Returns file path for `certification_files[]`.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Youssef Benali",
  "name_ar": "يوسف بنعلي",

  "bio": "Professional motorcycle trainer with 8 years of competitive riding and coaching experience on circuits in UAE and KSA.",
  "bio_ar": "مدرب دراجات نارية محترف مع 8 سنوات من الخبرة التنافسية على الحلبات في الإمارات والسعودية.",

  "specialty_ids": [1, 2, 4],

  "experience_years": 8,

  "certifications": "FIM Level 2, MSF Certified, UAE Motorsports Federation License",

  "photo": "trainers/photos/photo.jpg",
  "cover": "trainers/covers/cover.jpg",
  "certification_files": [
    "trainers/certs/fim_level2.pdf",
    "trainers/certs/msf_cert.pdf"
  ],

  "training_bike_ids": [1, 2, 3],

  "level_prices": [
    { "level_id": 1, "price": 150 },
    { "level_id": 2, "price": 220 },
    { "level_id": 3, "price": 350 }
  ]
}

request.description:
Submit trainer registration. Status is `pending` until admin approves.

**Fields:**
- `specialty_ids`: IDs from GET /api/specialties (1=Coaching, 2=Competition, 3=Off-Road, 4=Street)
- `training_bike_ids`: one or more garage bike IDs (must belong to the user) — first one becomes primary
- `level_prices`: proposed price per level — admin sets the final approved price
- File paths come from STEP 1 & 2 upload responses

Saves `{{trainer_id}}` automatically.
Minimal registration — only required fields. Bikes, levels and specialties can be added later.

item.name: 4 – Training Bikes Management
item.description: Manage which garage bikes the trainer uses for training sessions. At least one bike should be marked as primary.

request.description: Returns trainer's selected training bikes with `is_training_ready` flag per bike.
Add a garage bike as a training bike. `garage_id` must belong to the authenticated user.
Mark a bike as the primary training bike (clears primary flag from others).
Remove a bike from training bikes (does not delete from garage).

item.name: 5 – Admin – Level Management
item.description: Admin only. Manage training levels (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced). Already seeded on deployment.

request.description: List all levels including inactive ones.

body.raw:
{
  "name_en": "Expert",
  "name_ar": "خبير",
  "description": "Elite level for professional competitors.",
  "required_certifications": ["FIM Level 3", "National competition license"],
  "sort_order": 4
}

request.description: Create a new training level. `slug` is auto-generated from `name_en`.
Update any field of a level. Send only the fields to change.
Hard delete if no trainers linked. Soft deactivate (is_active=false) if trainers are linked.

item.name: 6 – Admin – Trainer Review & Level Approval
item.description: Admin reviews pending trainer applications. Can approve/reject individual levels with final prices.

request.description: List trainers filtered by status. Values: `pending` | `approved` | `rejected` | `suspended`. Saves first trainer as `{{trainer_id}}`.
View all level proposals for a trainer with their status (proposed / approved / rejected).
Approve one or more levels with final prices. `approve_trainer: true` sets trainer status to `approved`.
Reject a single level. Trainer can re-apply for this level later.
Reject the full trainer application and set status to `rejected`.

item.name: 7 – Trainer Profile Setup (post-approval)
item.description: After admin approval, trainer completes their profile: locations, schedule, and gallery.

request.description: Get authenticated trainer's full profile. Saves `{{trainer_id}}`.

body.raw:
{
  "location_name": "Dubai Motor City Circuit",
  "location_name_ar": "حلبة موتور سيتي دبي",
  "city_id": 1,
  "latitude": 25.0416,
  "longitude": 55.2407,
  "price_per_hour": 150
}

request.description: Add a training location. Saves `{{location_id}}` automatically. `price_per_hour` optional — overrides default if set.
Public endpoint — returns all trainer locations.
Delete one of the trainer's locations.
`day_of_week`: 0=Sunday … 6=Saturday.
Upload an image file first. Returns a path string — use it in `images[]` of POST gallery.
Add 1–10 images to trainer gallery. `images[]` paths come from POST upload-image. `caption` is optional.
Public endpoint — returns all gallery photos for a trainer.
Update the caption of a gallery entry. Replace `{{gallery_id}}` with the gallery item ID.
Delete a gallery photo. Replace `{{gallery_id}}` with the gallery item ID.
Reorder gallery photos. Send array of IDs in the desired display order.

item.name: 8 – Trainer Courses
item.description: Trainer creates course packages. Flow: create (draft) → update → publish. Archived courses cannot be edited.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Beginner Circuit Training",
  "title_ar": "تدريب المبتدئين في الحلبة",
  "description": "Learn the basics of motorcycle control on a safe circuit.",
  "description_ar": "تعلم أساسيات التحكم بالدراجة النارية على حلبة آمنة.",
  "level_id": 1,
  "hours_per_session": 2,
  "total_sessions": 5,
  "original_price": 150,
  "promo_price": 120,
  "location_id": {{location_id}},
  "can_travel": false
}

request.description:
Create a course in draft status. Saves `{{course_id}}`.

**Key fields:**
- `level_id`: from GET trainer levels
- `location_id`: from POST add location (optional)
- `can_travel`: trainer goes to client's location
- `promo_price`: optional, must be less than `original_price`
- `session_date` / `session_time`: optional, for fixed-date sessions

item.name: POST create course – trainer travels to client

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Private Lesson – I come to you",
  "title_ar": "درس خاص – أنا آتي إليك",
  "level_id": 1,
  "hours_per_session": 1,
  "total_sessions": 3,
  "original_price": 200,
  "can_travel": true
}

request.description: Returns all trainer's courses (all statuses). Filter by `?status=draft|published|archived`.
Update any field. Only `draft` and `published` courses can be updated. Archived courses cannot.
Move course from `draft` → `published`. Becomes visible to clients.
Move course from `published` → `archived`. Cannot be edited after archiving.
Only `draft` courses can be deleted.

item.name: 9 – Client – Browse Trainers
item.description: Public endpoints — no auth required. Clients browse trainers and their courses.

request.description: List all approved trainers.
Returns only published courses for a trainer.
Filter published courses by level.

item.name: 10 – Client – Book a Session
item.description:
Booking flow for the client (mobile user).

**Flow:**
1. GET trainer published courses → pick a course
2. GET trainer availability → pick a date + slot
3. POST book → get `booking_id` + `payment_url`
4. Client pays via `payment_url` (PayTabs)
5. After payment: GET booking to check status
6. After session: POST confirm-completion

**Cal.com frontend integration:** Use `GET availability` to populate the calendar slots and `POST book` to create the booking. The `course_id` auto-fills duration, price, and level.

request.description: Returns available slots for the given date range. Each slot has `date`, `start_time`, `end_time`, `is_available`. Feed this into the cal.com-style calendar on the frontend.

Book a specific course session.

**With `course_id`:** duration, price and level are auto-filled from the course.
**Without `course_id`:** provide `duration_hours` + `session_type` manually.

Returns `booking_id` + `payment_url` (PayTabs). Client must pay via that URL to secure the slot.
Book without a specific course — custom session. Requires `duration_hours` and `session_type`.
Returns all bookings for the authenticated client. Filter with `?status=confirmed|completed|cancelled`.
Re-initiate payment if the initial `payment_url` expired. Returns a new PayTabs payment URL.
Client confirms the session was completed. Triggers trainer payout.

item.name: 11 – Trainer – My Sessions
item.description:
Trainer manages incoming booking requests.

**Session lifecycle (trainer side):**
`confirmed` → trainer accepts → `accepted` → trainer starts → `in_progress` → trainer completes → `awaiting_confirmation` → client confirms → `completed`

request.description: Returns all sessions for the authenticated trainer. Filter: `?status=confirmed|accepted|in_progress|completed`.
Trainer accepts the booking. Status: `confirmed` → `accepted`.
Mark session as started. Status: `accepted` → `in_progress`.
Mark session as done. Status: `in_progress` → `awaiting_confirmation`. Client then confirms to release payment.

item.name: 12 – Admin – Bookings
item.description: Admin view of all trainer bookings.

request.description: Filter: `?trainer_id=`, `?status=`, `?from_date=`, `?to_date=`.

item.name: 13 – Admin – Courses Moderation
item.description: Admin can view and delete any course regardless of status.

request.description: Filter with `?trainer_id=`, `?status=`, `?level_id=`.
Admin can delete any course (any status).
